name: Homemade Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes, celery, and salt in water until tender.
2. Strain the water, saving 1 cup of the broth.
3. Make a white sauce using 1 cup of the white sauce mix with 2 cups of cold water.
4. When the white sauce is thick, slowly add the saved stock and then the potatoes and celery.
5. Let simmer for about 15 minutes, adding salt and pepper to taste.
6. Makes about 2 large bowls or 4 cups of delicious hot homemade soup.
